en_title: Robert Pattinson's Return in The Batman: Part 2 Delayed Again, Now Arriving 2028
cn_title: 罗伯特·帕丁森《新蝙蝠侠2》再延期，2028年上映
subtitle: 黑暗骑士回归再等一年
opus_summary: 《新蝙蝠侠2》再次延期，由2027年10月推至2028年2月18日。华纳兄弟档期连锁调整及派拉蒙收购审批延长被指是原因，届时距首部上映已近6年。

paragraphs.en: The Batman: Part 2 has suffered yet another delay, leaving Robert Pattinson's long-awaited return as the Dark Knight now set to launch in 2028.
paragraphs.cn: 《新蝙蝠侠2》再次延期，罗伯特·帕丁森备受期待的黑暗骑士回归如今定于2028年上映。

paragraphs.en: Having previously been due to arrive in theaters in October 2027, The Batman: Part 2 will now touch down on February 18, 2028. This latest change follows a string of previous delays to Matt Reeves' Batman sequel, which had originally been set to arrive back in 2025.
paragraphs.cn: 《新蝙蝠侠2》此前定于2027年10月登陆影院，如今改至2028年2月18日。这是马特·里维斯执导的蝙蝠侠续集一系列延期中的最新一次，影片最初曾计划于2025年上映。

paragraphs.en: According to Deadline , The Batman: Part 2's latest holdup can be blamed on a cascade of changing release dates over at Warner Bros., as the company's impending sale to Paramount takes longer than first anticipated. Paramount's $110.9 billion acquisition of the company had been set to be finalized this fall, though is still to be approved by regulators in a string of countries including the UK and Japan, as well as the European Union.
paragraphs.cn: 据Deadline报道，《新蝙蝠侠2》最新延期可归因于华纳兄弟一连串上映日期调整，因为公司即将出售给派拉蒙的交易比最初预期耗时更久。派拉蒙以1109亿美元(约合人民币7519亿元)收购该公司的交易原定今年秋季完成，但仍需英国、日本等多个国家以及欧盟的监管机构批准。

paragraphs.en: Today does at least bring a snippet of new footage from director Matt Reeves: a 35-second clip dubbed as a camera test , showing Battinson slowly turning to the camera while wearing the iconic cowl.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，导演马特·里维斯今天至少带来了一小段新画面：这段被称为摄影测试的35秒视频中，「蝙蝠森」戴着标志性头罩缓缓转向镜头。

paragraphs.en: Batman's old October 2027 date is now being filled by The Great Beyond, Warner Bros.' new sci-fi movie from J.J. Abrams that stars Glen Powell and Jenna Ortega. Meanwhile, its new February 2028 spot means it'll arrive during the four-day Presidents Day holiday weekend, which previously hosted Marvel tentpoles such as Black Panther, Ant-Man and the Wasp Quantumania, and Captain America: Brave New World. (Well... at least Black Panther was good.)
paragraphs.cn: 蝙蝠侠原来的2027年10月档期现由《The Great Beyond》接替，这是J.J. Abrams执导、Glen Powell和Jenna Ortega主演的华纳兄弟新科幻片。新的2028年2月档期则意味着影片将在为期4天的总统日假期周末上映，该档期此前曾推出《黑豹》《蚁人与黄蜂女：量子狂潮》和《美国队长4》等漫威大片。（好吧……至少《黑豹》不错。）

paragraphs.en: Marvel currently has nothing announced for a similar release window, with its current run of releases only dated up to December 2027's Avengers: Secret Wars.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威目前尚未宣布同一档期的作品，其现有上映计划只排到2027年12月的《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》。

paragraphs.en: While today's date change will mean Reeves has longer to work on The Batman: Part 2 in post-production, it is yet another holdup to a project that many DC fans feel is already arriving too long after Pattinson's Dark Knight debut. By the time it launches in 2028, almost six years will have passed since The Batman launched back in March 2022.
paragraphs.cn: 今天的日期调整意味着Reeves有更多时间完成《新蝙蝠侠2》后期制作，但对许多DC粉丝而言，这个项目距离帕丁森首次出演黑暗骑士本就已经太久，如今又一次延后。等影片2028年上映时，距《新蝙蝠侠》2022年3月上映已近6年。

paragraphs.en: Since that time, Reeves' sequel has been postponed multiple times, firstly due to Hollywood strikes, and then later due to the length of time Reeves took to meticulously complete its script. The fact that Pattinson's Batman is still waiting in the wings has proven problematic to James Gunn's DCU, too, which is yet to introduce its own incarnation of Batman — though plans to so are already in motion, with work on a script for The Brave and the Bold already underway.
paragraphs.cn: 此后，Reeves的续集多次延期，先是因为好莱坞罢工，后来又因Reeves花费很长时间精心完成剧本。帕丁森版蝙蝠侠仍在候场也给James Gunn的DCU带来问题，后者尚未引入自己的蝙蝠侠版本，不过相关计划已经启动，《英勇与无畏》的剧本正在编写。

paragraphs.en: The Batman: Part 2 filming officially got underway last month , with Pattinson joined once again by Jeffrey Wright as Jim Gordon and Andy Serkis as Alfred Pennyworth . Sebastian Stan is rumored to be playing Harvey Dent , with his fellow MCU alum Scarlett Johansson rumored to be playing Gilda Dent , while Charles Dance is expected to be playing Christopher Dent . Colin Farrell is also back, though his Penguin character will only show up for two scenes .
paragraphs.cn: 《新蝙蝠侠2》上月正式开拍，帕丁森将再次与饰演Jim Gordon的Jeffrey Wright及饰演Alfred Pennyworth的安迪·瑟金斯合作。有传言称塞巴斯蒂安·斯坦饰演哈维·登特，同为MCU演员的斯嘉丽·约翰逊饰演吉尔达·登特，Charles Dance预计饰演Christopher Dent。Colin Farrell也会回归，但他的企鹅人只在两个场景中出现。
